title: crepis aurea f. lucida
intro: Crepis aurea f. lucida, also known as the golden hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its shiny, golden leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Crepis aurea f. lucida include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and medicinal properties.
